author: taulepton_
content: <@335401151711412224> what are you working on at the minute? How does your capacity look? I notice you have good understanding of the proof node api and we would like to create specs for it here https://github.com/eth-act/execution-proofs-api which follow a similar standard as https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis. Wondering if this is something you would be interested in doing?

author: chotuchaiwala
content: sounds interesting, mostly doing parallel tooling rn to make running, testing and profiling the zk proving stack. I think I can pick it up. Feel free to drop any additional requirements or context that might help

author: taulepton_
content: Perfect! I'll write up an issue and shoot it over to you.
